headline: T-Mobile revives free perk for customers amid challenges
summary: In recent months, T-Mobile has been generous with the perks it offers loyal customers, especially as it struggles to prevent them from switching carriers. As T-Mobile wrestles with rising competition, it is sweetening the deal by bringing back a free customer benefit valued at about $150. In 2025, ...

headline: Cogent Communications Carries the Internet but Its Stock Has Been Crushed
summary: Most investors have never heard of Cogent Communications (NASDAQ:CCOI). That relative obscurity stands in contrast to the scale of its infrastructure. This is a company that literally carries the internet, trading near multi-year lows while quietly building what could be its most important business yet. headline: T-Mobile’s Customer Machine vs. Vodafone’s Restructuring Gamble vs. SK Telecom’s Surprise Rally: One Clear Winner Emerges
summary: T-Mobile US (NASDAQ: TMUS), Vodafone (NASDAQ: VOD), and SK Telecom (NYSE: SKM) occupy the same sector but run three completely different businesses in three different competitive environments. With fresh earnings for two of them and a surging stock price for the third, now is a good moment to compare how each stacks up. T-Mobile Keeps ...
